page_content:
Formerly: BUDT758M.

BUDT742 Machine Learning & Blockchain for FinTech (2 Credits) Machine Learning is rapidly changing the financial services industries and Blockchain is poised to make fundamental changes to how the financial sector is structured and organized. The focus of the course is

to provide a deep understanding for the current machine learning and emerging Blockchain technologies in the financial services industry. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith.
